mapper.select:
/* ====== cmn.filedownsrch.selectList =========*/
SELECT NVL(A.MENU_ID, D.MENU_ID) AS MENU_ID , TO_CHAR(NVL(A.FILE_DN_DT, D.EXCL_STRT_DT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FILE_DN_DT , NVL(A.USR_ID,D.USR_ID) AS USR_ID , A.FILE_NM , A.IP_INFO , NVL(A.DUTY_NM, D.DUTY_NM) AS DUTY_NM , A.FILE_ROUT , A.FILE_SIZE/1024 AS FILE_SIZE , A.DWNLD_RSN , A.DATA_CNT , NVL(C.MENU_NM, D.MENU_NM) AS MENU_NM , FN_GET_USRNM(NVL(A.USR_ID,D.USR_ID)) AS USR_NM , NVL(B.ORGN_ID, D.ORGN_ID) AS ORGN_ID , FN_GET_ORGNM(NVL(B.ORGN_ID, D.ORGN_ID)) AS ORGN_NM , D.SEARCH_VAL FROM CMN_FILE_DNLD_MGMT_MST A LEFT OUTER JOIN CMN_USR_MST B ON A.USR_ID = B.USR_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN CMN_MENU_MST C ON A.MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID FULL OUTER JOIN CMN_EXCL_DNLD_HST D ON A.EXCL_DNLD_ID = D.EXCL_DNLD_ID WHERE 1=1
AND (B.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId} OR D.ORGN_ID = #{orgnId})
AND (B.USR_NM like '%' || #{searchUsrNm} || '%' OR D.USR_NM like '%' || #{searchUsrNm} || '%')
AND (A.MENU_ID = #{searchMenuList} OR D.MENU_ID = #{searchMenuList})
AND (A.FILE_DN_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt},'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt},'YYYYMMDD') + 1 OR D.EXCL_STRT_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{searchStrtDt},'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{searchEndDt},'YYYYMMDD') + 1)
ORDER BY NVL(A.FILE_DN_DT, D.EXCL_STRT_DT) DESC
